attributes.description: Alerts when `redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio < 1.0`. RSS below used means Redis is swapping to disk.
attributes.name: [Redis OTel] Memory fragmentation indicates swapping

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis memory fragmentation indicates swapping

### What fired
`redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio < 1.0` during the window.

### Why it matters
Fragmentation ratio < 1.0 means the OS reports less RSS than Redis's logical used memory — Redis pages are in swap. Swap completely destroys Redis latency.

### Triage
1. Check host swap usage.
2. Inspect memory pressure on the VM.

### Remediation
- Disable swap for Redis / add RAM.

### Tuning
- Always P1.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
  AND redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
// Fragmentation ratio < 1.0 means RSS < used memory: Redis is swapping to disk
| STATS avg_frag = AVG(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio)
  BY server.address, server.port
| WHERE avg_frag < 1.0
| SORT avg_frag ASC
